scripts.build: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --publish never
scripts.build:win: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --win --publish never
scripts.build:mac: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --mac --publish never
scripts.build:linux: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --linux --publish never
scripts.build:win:ci: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --win --publish always
scripts.build:mac:ci: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --mac --publish always
scripts.build:linux:ci: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --linux --publish always
scripts.pack: node esbuild.config.mjs && electron-builder build --config electron-builder.config.js --dir --publish never
